allow:
Bash(gh pr create --base main --title "Update IPCCH model code and analysis" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Summary
- Add comprehensive IPCCH forecasting model notebooks and analysis
- Include feature importance analysis with SHAP visualizations
- Add regional vs global model comparison experiments
- Include Cleanlab label quality analysis framework
- Add country-level performance analysis
- Include error rate mapping infrastructure
- Add supporting Python modules and configuration files

## Key Changes
- Multiple forecasting scenarios \(main, ablation, cleanlab, rolling, phase-specific\)
- Feature importance notebooks with visualizations
- Regional model comparison \(6 and 9 regions\)
- Error rate mapping at point and polygon levels
- Country performance disaggregation tools

## Data Management
- Excluded large CSV files \(using Parquet format where available\)
- Updated .gitignore for better data file management
- Removed large images and PDF outputs from version control

Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)")

Bash(gh pr create --title "Fix nowcasting two-layer notebook index alignment and NaN filtering" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Summary
- **Index alignment bug**: `df` \(forecasting\) and `df_nowcasting` had independent pandas integer indices, so `index.intersection\(\)` was always empty — all 4 phases were skipped and `y_pred_test` stayed empty, causing `KeyError: ''y_pred''` in `convert_prob_to_phase\(\)`. Fixed by pre-merging nowcasting `diff_set` features into `df` on `\(area_id, date\)` with `now_` prefix so both layers share the same DataFrame indices.
- **NaN filtering bug**: `notna\(\).all\(axis=1\)` dropped ~77% of rows because columns like `gini` \(72% NaN\) and `WFP_Price` \(34% NaN\) eliminated nearly every row. Changed to `notna\(\).any\(axis=1\)` since XGBoost handles partial NaN natively.
- Added complete 2023/2022 year blocks with post-processing cells \(save CSV, `%reset -f`, reload\) following the established notebook pattern.

## Test plan
- [ ] Run Cell 0 — verify printed merge stats show ~173 nowcasting features
- [ ] Run Cell 1 \(2024\) — verify no KeyError, metrics printed \(accuracy ~0.5-0.7\)
- [ ] Run Cell 2 \(2024 post-processing\) — CSV saved to `nowcasting_prediction/`
- [ ] Run Cells 3-6 \(2023/2022 blocks\) — verify metrics printed and CSVs saved
- [ ] Confirm no `KeyError` on any year block

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)")
